channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: Iran war is the greatest threat to global energy ‘in history’, warns IEA
item.description: <![CDATA[Iran war is the greatest threat to global energy ‘in history’, warns IEA]]>

item.title: Goldman’s chief warns private credit risks show cycle ‘has not been repealed’
item.description: <![CDATA[Goldman’s chief warns private credit risks show cycle ‘has not been repealed’]]>

item.title: UK borrowing costs reach highest level since 2008 as economic hit from war mounts
item.description: <![CDATA[UK borrowing costs reach highest level since 2008 as economic hit from war mounts]]>

item.title: The first major stock index just fell into correction territory. Will others follow?
item.description: <![CDATA[The first major stock index just fell into correction territory. Will others follow?]]>

item.title: Super Micro’s stock sinks 33% after co-founder’s indictment. Here are Wall Street’s biggest questions.
item.description: <![CDATA[Super Micro’s stock sinks 33% after co-founder’s indictment. Here are Wall Street’s biggest questions.]]>
